title: ABC Song for Toddlers | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
TAP TAP! Benny stacks A, B, C up high!
Learn ABC letters with toddlers in a bright preschool cartoon.
Benny teaches simple first words from A to D with music and claps.
Educational short for kids ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
